use std::io::{self, Write, BufWriter};

fn write_records<W: Write>(writer: &mut BufWriter<W>, records: &[String]) -> io::Result<()> {
    for record in records {
        writeln!(writer, "{}", record)?;
        writer.flush()?;
    }
    Ok(())
}

fn emit_batch<W: Write>(writer: &mut W, items: &[u64]) -> io::Result<()> {
    for item in items {
        write!(writer, "{}\n", item)?;
        writer.flush()?;
    }
    Ok(())
}
